profile.name: Zejun Li
profile.aboutText:
Hi, I'm Zejun (aka Ting Ting)! I'm a junior at the University of Michigan studying User Experience Design. I'm passionate about exploring the unique problems that arise from the convergence of different disciplines in UX and designing experiences that spark joy :)

Outside of school and design, I play a lot of ultimate frisbee! I also enjoy fishing (trying to get into fly fishing this summer), birdwatching, reading looong fantasy and sci-fi books (check out The Priory of the Orange Tree), and watching food reviews on YouTube.
profile.footerNote: This portfolio is inspired by Google Drive’s interaction patterns and Material Design. It is not affiliated with Google.

projects.title: U-M GPT
projects.fullDescription: This project centered on a redesign of the interface of U-M GPT, the University of Michigan's custom generative AI platform, including the implementation of a new feature to improve the user experience of students. Completed within a semester-long intro to UX course, this project progressed through the full UX design process, starting with the client brief and initial sketches to low- and high-fidelity wireframes, all underscored by an emphasis on strong storytelling and thoughtful design choices.

projects.title: MotiMuse
projects.description: Designing a mobile app to encourage music practice
projects.fullDescription: MotiMuse is a motivational music practice tool designed by a cross-functional team of five over the course of six weeks for the U-M Ross Business+Tech Innovation Jam. Our design won 1st place in the EdTech track and 2nd overall out of 72 teams, receiving a total of $4,500 in seed funding.

projects.title: Stardew Valley Game Remake
projects.fullDescription: This project was completed as an assignment for the class Games & UX, where we explored the industry practice of video games user research and design. Our team identified areas for improvement and proposed design changes for a hypothetical remake/update of the game Stardew Valley based on insights from market research and user interviews.

projects.title: Counter-Strike 2 Game UX Study
projects.fullDescription: This case study article was completed as an assignment for the class Games & UX, where we explored the industry practice of video games user research and design. I explored the effectiveness of Counter-Strike 2's UX and provided considerations for the developers if a game update were to be made.
